channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US explores third-country resettlement options for stranded Afghan evacuees amid visa delays
item.description: The United States is reported to be in discussions with the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to resettle around 1,100 Afghan nationals who are currently stranded in Qatar. These individuals had earl...

item.title: Call for Strong Enforcement Against Illegal Roadside Fuel Sales in Tanzania
item.description: This editorial highlights the growing concern over illegal roadside fuel vending along highways in Tanzania, describing it as a serious threat to both public safety and the national economy. Fuel is i...

item.title: Artemis II Success Sets Stage for NASA’s Next Steps and Lunar Mission Challenges
item.description: NASA’s Artemis II mission has successfully completed its objectives, marking the first crewed flight beyond low Earth orbit in over 50 years. The Orion spacecraft performed well during reentry, with i...

item.title: Late-season storm expected to bring heavy snow and hazardous conditions to Saskatchewan and Manitoba
item.description: Environment Canada has issued multiple weather alerts as a significant late-season storm is set to impact parts of Saskatchewan and Manitoba, bringing a mix of rain, snow, and potentially hazardous co...

item.title: North Korean Hackers Use AI to Steal $12 Million in Crypto
item.description: Cybersecurity firm Expel uncovered a North Korean state-sponsored cybercrime operation dubbed HexagonalRodent, where relatively unskilled hackers leveraged AI tools from companies like OpenAI, Cursor,...

item.title: Internal Labour tensions grow as questions persist over Mandelson appointment and No 10 decision-making
item.description: This political sketch describes growing unease within the UK government and Labour Party surrounding Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s leadership, focusing in particular on the controversy over the appoin...

item.title: Small acts of kindness that helped people cope with loneliness
item.description: The article explores how small, often simple gestures can significantly reduce feelings of loneliness, sharing six personal accounts from readers. Against a backdrop of increasing social isolation lin...

item.title: Barcelona secure narrow win over Celta Vigo but suffer injury setback to Lamine Yamal
item.description: Barcelona manage grind out a tight 1-0 victory against Celta Vigo as dem dey push closer to winning La Liga, but the win come with serious concern after young star Lamine Yamal pick up injury. The tee...

item.title: Why timing before the midterms could ease confirmation of a Trump Supreme Court nominee
item.description: The article examines the political and procedural dynamics surrounding a potential U.S. Supreme Court vacancy ahead of the November 2026 midterm elections. It focuses on speculation that Justice Samue...

item.title: Nigeria Records Progress in Child HIV Treatment and Prevention, FG Calls for Continued Support
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria, together with im partners, don highlight the gains wey dem don make for the fight against HIV for children. During the 2026 Linking and Learning Meeting of the Paedi...

item.title: Laguna opens multiple free chemotherapy centers to aid cancer patients
item.description: Cancer patients in Laguna province can now access free chemotherapy services through the newly opened AML Life-Care Chemotherapy Center in Sta. Rosa City. The city government, under Mayor Arlene Arcil...

item.title: Investigation underway into major LAPD data breach exposing hundreds of thousands of confidential records
item.description: Los Angeles city officials are demanding answers after a massive data breach exposed a large cache of sensitive Los Angeles Police Department-related records. According to reporting, approximately 337...

item.title: US Extends Ceasefire with Iran Indefinitely Amid Tensions in Strait of Hormuz and Ship Seizures
item.description: The ongoing conflict involving Iran, Israel, and the United States saw a significant development as US President Donald Trump announced an indefinite extension of the ceasefire with Iran. This move, m...

item.title: ICC affirms authority over Duterte case as legal proceedings move forward
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has denied the appeal filed by former Philippine president Rodrigo Duterte, affirming that it has jurisdiction over the case linked to his administration’s contr...

item.title: Interpol issues red notice for wanted Lyari gang suspect Wasiullah Lakho in Karachi cases
item.description: Interpol has issued a red notice for Wasiullah Lakho, a fugitive Lyari gangster who is reportedly hiding abroad and is wanted by Karachi police in multiple serious criminal cases. According to South D...

item.title: Chelsea part ways with Rosenior after poor results and goal drought
item.description: Chelsea Football Club have decided to part ways with head coach Liam Rosenior after only about three months in charge, following a very poor run of results that has put their season in serious trouble...

item.title: ICC Appeals Chamber Affirms Jurisdiction Over Duterte Case
item.description: On April 22, 2026, the International Criminal Court (ICC) Appeals Chamber ruled on former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte’s challenge to the court’s jurisdiction in his crimes against humanity ca...

item.title: How a Reddit community is helping people embrace baldness
item.description: The article describes the online community r/bald on Reddit, a space where people who are losing their hair or considering shaving their heads come together to encourage one another. The subreddit’s s...

item.title: Developing a framework to assess cultural and spiritual loss in Native Title compensation cases
item.description: Australian courts are currently facing a complex legal challenge: how to properly value the cultural and spiritual harm suffered by Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Peoples when their traditional...

item.title: Starmer confirms discussions over potential diplomatic role for aide amid wider political row
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer has acknowledged that discussions took place within Downing Street regarding a possible diplomatic role for his former communications chief, Matthew Doyle, though he insisted that no ...
